authorities.owns: proposal, design, specs, and the unique tasks checklist for specification-led changes
local delivery facts and immutable execution, validation, review, and delivery records
executable fail-closed readiness, recording, and delivered-consistency decisions
generated owner, route, stage dependency, command, and advanced-trigger views
authorities.excludes: delivery eligibility and persisted project facts

authorities.owns: task, thread, subagent, worktree, approval, model, cancellation, steering, and handoff lifecycle
all Kafa fact mutation, candidate inspection, controller verification, integration, and delivery recording

safeguards.rule: Business runtime uses only project files, local Git or content identity, project SQLite, and optional already-local container execution.
Only the root controller mutates Kafa facts; producers and reviewers return results through the Native Host.
Native Codex/ChatGPT is the only owner of task, subagent, worktree, approval, model, cancel, steer, and handoff lifecycle.
Command evidence is created only by controller execution and is stored once without overwrite.
Execution, validation, qualification, gate, and delivery must remain current for the candidate under review.
Missing, stale, skipped, blocked, not-run, fixture-only, zero-count, or unverifiable evidence never becomes delivery pass.

routes.when: broad, architectural, cross-module, long-lived, or complete verified delivery work
routes.obligation: route to OpenSpec when specification is needed, then run the complete local delivery workflow

routes.when: small clear low-risk patch with explicit acceptance
routes.obligation: keep the diff and evidence surface narrow
reproduce before fixing and retain a regression oracle
establish the failing test before production change
keep producer and reviewer contexts distinct when independent review is claimed

routes.when: runtime, boundary, fact, or generated-view drift requires audit
routes.obligation: audit evidence without relabelling missing checks as pass

routes.when: a completed milestone or repeated escape needs lessons captured
routes.obligation: derive lessons from verified delivery evidence

advanced_triggers.when: two or more producers run in parallel, shared-file integration is required, or explicit advanced review is requested
advanced_triggers.activates: full delegation matrix and root integration checkpoint

advanced_triggers.when: schema, migration, runtime ownership, trust, delivery gate, security, permissions, concurrency, data loss, public API, or cross-module authority changes
multi-day work, repeated escapes, schema or runtime change or drift, or milestone review
delivery milestone completes or a failure loop exposes a stable lesson
Native Host integration, evaluator, packaging, or release surface changes
advanced_triggers.activates: real Native single and parallel evidence

advanced_triggers.when: packaging, supply-chain, release tooling, or an authorized release candidate changes

stages.label: Delivery plan
stages.action: atomically create the linked local plan graph

stages.label: Baseline confirmation
stages.action: explicitly freeze and confirm current scope

stages.label: Acceptance-target qualification
stages.action: bind acceptance revision and target digest with rationale and actor

stages.label: Task start
stages.action: root controller explicitly starts the generated planned task

stages.label: Task submission
stages.action: root controller inspects returned code and records producer context

stages.label: Controller verification
stages.action: run the qualified target and persist immutable current-candidate evidence

stages.label: Task acceptance
stages.action: accept only after submitted code and controller verification are complete

stages.label: Quality gate
stages.action: record reviewer findings, qualifications, and residual risk

stages.label: Delivery readiness
stages.action: reuse the canonical prerequisite evaluator before phase transition

stages.label: Delivery record
stages.action: record the fact-derived verified local handoff; compatibility prose flags are supplemental and deployment remains excluded

stages.label: Delivery validation
stages.action: re-evaluate delivered consistency on the recorded candidate

commands.baseline-confirmation: kafa project baseline --repo . confirm --id BL1 --summary 'confirmed scope' --by root-controller
commands.task-submit: kafa project task --repo . submit PATCH-T1 --context-id producer-context --evidence 'root inspected returned code'
commands.task-accept: kafa project task --repo . accept PATCH-T1 --evidence 'verification and review complete'
commands.quality-gate: kafa project gate --repo . record --reviewer-context fresh --reviewer-context-id reviewer-context --result pass --qualification PATCH-Q1
commands.delivery-record: kafa project delivery --repo . record --scope 'verified local handoff' --handoff 'return code and residual risks'

handoff_obligations: changed files or an explicit not-derivable statement
exact tests with counts and outcomes
known gaps, not-run checks, and residual risk
explicit statement that deployment is not included
